questions.question: Tom has 4 apples. He gets 3 more. How many apples does he have now?
Sara has 10 balloons. 2 fly away. How many are left?
There are 5 birds on a tree. 4 more join them. How many birds are there?
A box has 12 crayons. 3 are used. How many remain?
Ben has 6 toy cars and gets 2 more. How many cars does he have?
